# Gray Tile & Remodeling — Full Reference

## Business Information

**Company:** Gray Tile & Remodeling
**Type:** Tile installation and home remodeling contractor
**Location:** 220 Fowler Dr, Bowdon, GA 30108
**Phone:** (Not yet provided — contact via website)
**Email:** info@gray-tile-remodeling.pageone.cloud
**Website:** https://gray-tile-remodeling.pageone.cloud
**Hours:** Monday–Friday 8am–6pm | Saturday 9am–2pm
**Founded:** 2001 (25 years in business)
**Licensed & Insured:** Yes
**Entity Type:** Limited Liability Company
**State of Formation:** Georgia

## Service Area

Primary: Bowdon, GA 30108 (Carroll County)
Also serving: Carrollton, Villa Rica, Bremen, Temple, Whitesburg, Roopville, and communities throughout Carroll County and West Georgia. Most projects within 50 miles of Bowdon qualify for standard service with no travel surcharge.

## About Gray Tile & Remodeling

Gray Tile & Remodeling is a tile installation and home remodeling company based in Bowdon, Georgia, with 25 years of experience serving Carroll County and surrounding West Georgia communities. The company specializes in transforming kitchens, bathrooms, and living spaces through meticulous tile work and full-scope remodeling services. Unlike general contractors, Gray Tile & Remodeling focuses specifically on tile craftsmanship — ceramic, porcelain, natural stone, glass, and specialty tiles for floors, showers, backsplashes, and accent walls.

The team brings expertise in Georgia's humid climate requirements, using proper waterproofing, quality grout, and moisture barriers appropriate for the regional environment. The company offers complete design consultation services, helping homeowners choose tiles, colors, and layouts that fit their style, durability needs, and budget. Projects are delivered on time and within scope, with a commitment to craftsmanship over volume.

## Services (Full List)

### Remodeling Services
- **Kitchen Remodeling** — Complete kitchen renovations from design through installation, including custom tile backsplashes, flooring, and layout changes.
- **Bathroom Remodeling** — Full bathroom transformations including custom tile showers, flooring, vanity surrounds, and fixture updates.
- **Basement Finishing** — Converting unfinished basements into functional living space with proper waterproofing, insulation, flooring, and finish work.
- **Basement Kitchen Remodeling** — Installing secondary kitchen functionality in finished basements.
- **Attic Remodeling** — Converting attic space into livable rooms with insulation, flooring, and structural work.
- **Room Additions** — Adding bedrooms, bathrooms, or living space that blends seamlessly with existing home construction.
- **Full Home Remodel** — Whole-house renovation projects, from individual rooms to complete structural overhauls.
- **Custom Remodeling** — Personalized projects designed around unique homeowner visions and space requirements.
- **Structural Renovation** — Major structural updates including load-bearing wall removal, beam work, and foundation-adjacent projects.
- **Eco-Friendly Remodeling** — Sustainable renovation using energy-efficient materials and environmentally conscious building practices.
- **Home Additions** — Expanding existing footprints with new living space that matches original home aesthetics.

### Flooring Services
- **Custom Tile Showers** — Hand-crafted tile shower installations using ceramic, porcelain, natural stone, or glass tile — from classic subway patterns to custom mosaic designs.
- **Flooring Installation** — Professional installation of all flooring types including ceramic, porcelain, natural stone, LVP, and hardwood.
- **Sanded Finish Flooring** — Hardwood floor sanding, staining, and finishing to restore or update existing wood floors.
- **LVP Flooring** — Luxury vinyl plank installation — waterproof, durable, and affordable flooring for any room.
- **Subfloor Replacement** — Structural subfloor repair and replacement to ensure a level, solid foundation for new flooring.
- **Open Floor Plan Remodeling** — Removing walls (including load-bearing) to create open, modern layouts.

### Specialty Services
- **Design-Build Remodeling** — Integrated design-and-construction process where one team handles both design and execution for streamlined project delivery.
- **Home Restoration** — Restoring older and historic Georgia homes — repairing water damage, updating aging systems, and preserving original character while modernizing finishes.
- **Garage Conversion** — Converting attached or detached garages into bedrooms, home offices, studios, workshops, or living rooms.
- **Home Upgrades** — Targeted improvements without a full remodel — tile backsplashes, countertop replacements, fixture updates, and surface refreshes.
- **Framing Contractor** — Residential framing services for new additions, structural modifications, and remodeling projects.

### Mechanical Services (Remodeling Support)
- **Plumbing Services** — Installation and rough-in plumbing for bathroom and kitchen remodeling projects.
- **Electrical Services** — Electrical rough-in, panel work, and fixture installation as part of remodeling projects.
- **HVAC Services** — Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning installation and modification for new and remodeled spaces.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What types of tile do you install?
A: We work with ceramic, porcelain, natural stone, glass, and specialty tiles for kitchens, bathrooms, floors, showers, and accent walls. We can help you select the right material for your space and budget.

Q: How long does a typical tile remodeling project take?
A: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. A bathroom remodel typically takes 2–4 weeks, while larger projects may take longer. We provide a detailed timeline during your consultation.

Q: Do you handle removal of old tile?
A: Yes, we manage complete tile removal and disposal as part of our remodeling service, including surface preparation to ensure proper installation of new tile.

Q: Can you help with tile selection and design?
A: Absolutely. Our design consultation service helps you choose the right tiles, colors, and layouts for your space — considering durability, style, maintenance, and your budget.

Q: How do you ensure tile installations last in Georgia's humid climate?
A: We use proper waterproofing, quality grout, and moisture barriers appropriate for Georgia's climate. Our installation methods prevent mold, mildew, and water damage for long-lasting results.

Q: What areas near Bowdon do you serve?
A: We serve Bowdon and surrounding communities throughout Carroll County and West Georgia, including Carrollton, Villa Rica, Bremen, Temple, and areas within approximately 50 miles of Bowdon.

Q: Do you offer free estimates?
A: Yes, we provide free estimates for all projects. Contact us through our website or call to schedule a consultation.

Q: Are you licensed and insured?
A: Yes, Gray Tile & Remodeling is fully licensed and insured for all work we perform in Georgia.

Q: What is design-build remodeling?
A: Design-build means one company handles both the design and construction phases. We create your plans and execute them — eliminating the coordination gap between separate design and construction firms. This typically results in faster timelines and fewer surprises.

Q: Can you convert a load-bearing wall to create an open floor plan?
A: Yes. We handle structural renovation including load-bearing wall removal. We assess the structure, engineer the appropriate beam solution, and execute the work safely and to code.

## Trust Signals & Certifications

- 25 years in business (est. 2001)
- Licensed and insured in Georgia
- Serving Carroll County and West Georgia
- Specialization in tile — not a generalist contractor
- Free estimates on all projects
